revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 28 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 28 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月28日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[貞享]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1685年]][[1月3日]]） - [[渋川春海|安井算哲]]が、平安時代から使われていた[[宣明暦]]の誤りを修正・改良した大和暦を幕府に提出。後の[[貞享暦]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月28日]]） - 長崎・横浜・函館の運上所を[[税関]]に改称 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月28日） - 国民皆兵を原則とした[[徴兵]]の詔書を発布。各地で反対一揆が起きる
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1601年]][[1月2日]]） - [[徳川義直]]、初代[[尾張藩]]主・[[徳川家康]]の九男（+ [[1650年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月16日]]） - [[井上馨]]、政治家・[[元老]]（+ [[1915年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1848年]][[1月4日]]） - [[桂太郎]]、11・13・15代[[内閣総理大臣]]・陸軍大将（+ [[1913年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[12月30日]]） - [[大砲萬右ェ門]]、18代[[横綱]]（+ [[1918年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘長]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1263年]][[1月9日]]） - [[親鸞]]、[[浄土真宗]]の開祖（* [[1173年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月27日 (旧暦)|11月27日]] 翌日[[11月29日 (旧暦)|11月29日]] - 前月[[10月28日 (旧暦)|10月28日]] 翌月[[12月28日 (旧暦)|12月28日]] *新暦[[11月28日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月28日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[貞享]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1685年]][[1月3日]]） - [[渋川春海|安井算哲]]が、平安時代から使われていた[[宣明暦]]の誤りを修正・改良した大和暦を幕府に提出。後の[[貞享暦]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月28日]]） - 長崎・横浜・函館の運上所を[[税関]]に改称 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月28日） - 国民皆兵を原則とした[[徴兵]]の詔書を発布。各地で反対一揆が起きる
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1601年]][[1月2日]]） - [[徳川義直]]、初代[[尾張藩]]主・[[徳川家康]]の九男（+ [[1650年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月16日]]） - [[井上馨]]、政治家・[[元老]]（+ [[1915年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1848年]][[1月4日]]） - [[桂太郎]]、11・13・15代[[内閣総理大臣]]・陸軍大将（+ [[1913年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[12月30日]]） - [[大砲萬右ェ門]]、18代[[横綱]]（+ [[1918年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘長]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1263年]][[1月9日]]） - [[親鸞]]、[[浄土真宗]]の開祖（* [[1173年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{作業用|11|27|11|29|10|28|12|11|1128}}
{{stub}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月28日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[貞享]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1685年]][[1月3日]]） - [[渋川春海|安井算哲]]が、平安時代から使われていた[[宣明暦]]の誤りを修正・改良した大和暦を幕府に提出。後の[[貞享暦]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月28日]]） - 長崎・横浜・函館の運上所を[[税関]]に改称 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月28日） - 国民皆兵を原則とした[[徴兵]]の詔書を発布。各地で反対一揆が起きる
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1601年]][[1月2日]]） - [[徳川義直]]、初代[[尾張藩]]主・[[徳川家康]]の九男（+ [[1650年]]） * [[元文]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1736年]][[12月29日]]） - [[木村蒹葭堂]]、[[文人]]・[[文人画|文人画家]]（+ [[1802年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月16日]]） - [[井上馨]]、政治家・[[元老]]（+ [[1915年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1848年]][[1月4日]]） - [[桂太郎]]、11・13・15代[[内閣総理大臣]]・陸軍大将（+ [[1913年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[1月10日]]） - [[月亭小文都]]、[[落語家]]（+ [[1902年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[12月30日]]） - [[大砲万右エ門|大砲萬右ェ門]]、18代[[横綱]]（+ [[1918年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘長]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1263年]]1月9日） - [[親鸞]]<ref>[{{NDLDC|821948/21}} 本願寺聖人親鸞傳繪上]</ref>、[[浄土真宗]]の宗祖とされる僧。（* [[1173年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|27|11|29|10|28|12|11|1128}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿八]] [[zh:十一月廿八]] [[en:draft:November 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}}元年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日}}) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872年12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘治}}5年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|ja|徳川義直}}, the first lord of the Owari Domain and ninth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1650|ja|1650}}). * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}}元年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1736|ja|1736}} {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日}}) – {{ill|Kimura Kanjado|ja|木村蒹葭堂}}, a literati and painter († {{ill|1802|ja|1802}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}6年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|January 16|ja|1月16日}}) – {{ill|Inoue Kaoru|ja|井上馨}}, a statesman and genrō († {{ill|1915|ja|1915}}). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}}4年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}}) – {{ill|Katsura Tarō|ja|桂太郎}}, a three-time Prime Minister and general († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}元年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|January 10|ja|1月10日}}) – {{ill|Tsukitei Kobundo|ja|月亭小文都}}, a rakugo performer († {{ill|1902|ja|1902}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}2年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日}}) – {{ill|Taihō Manueimon|ja|大砲萬右ェ門}}, the 18th yokozuna († {{ill|1918|ja|1918}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘長}}2年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1263|ja|1263}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}}) – {{ill|Shinran|ja|親鸞}}, regarded as the founder of Jōdo Shinshū (* {{ill|1173|ja|1173}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|29|12|1|10|30|12|11|1130}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月29日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[ja:11月29日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[Category:Lunar November]] {{citation needed}} {{citation needed}} [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:not Butsumetsus]] [[sn:November 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿九]] [[zh:十一月廿九]] [[en:draft:November 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:Days 29 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:November 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿九]] [[zh:十一月廿九]] [[en:draft:November 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:null category]][[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿九]] [[zh:十一月廿九]] [[en:draft:November 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.

== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日}}) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872年12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘治}}5年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|ja|徳川義直}}, the first lord of the Owari Domain and ninth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1650|ja|1650}}). * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1736|ja|1736}} {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日}}) – {{ill|Kimura Kanjado|ja|木村蒹葭堂}}, a literati and painter († {{ill|1802|ja|1802}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}6年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|January 16|ja|1月16日}}) – {{ill|Inoue Kaoru|ja|井上馨}}, a statesman and genrō († {{ill|1915|ja|1915}}). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}}4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}}) – {{ill|Katsura Tarō|ja|桂太郎}}, a three-time Prime Minister and general († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|January 10|ja|1月10日}}) – {{ill|Tsukitei Kobundo|ja|月亭小文都}}, a rakugo performer († {{ill|1902|ja|1902}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日}}) – {{ill|Taihō Manueimon|ja|大砲萬右ェ門}}, the 18th yokozuna († {{ill|1918|ja|1918}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘長}}2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1263|ja|1263}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}}) – {{ill|Shinran|ja|親鸞}}, regarded as the founder of Jōdo Shinshū (* {{ill|1173|ja|1173}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日}}) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872年12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.

[[sn:November 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿八]] [[zh:十一月廿八]] [[en:draft:November 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日}} ) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872年12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|ja|徳川義直}} , the first lord of the Owari Domain and ninth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1650|ja|1650}} ). * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1736|ja|1736}} {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Kanjado|ja|木村蒹葭堂}} , a literati and painter († {{ill|1802|ja|1802}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|January 16|ja|1月16日}} ) – {{ill|Inoue Kaoru|ja|井上馨}} , a statesman and genrō († {{ill|1915|ja|1915}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}} ) – {{ill|Katsura Tarō|ja|桂太郎}} , a three-time Prime Minister and general († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|January 10|ja|1月10日}} ) – {{ill|Tsukitei Kobundo|ja|月亭小文都}} , a rakugo performer († {{ill|1902|ja|1902}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日}} ) – {{ill|Taihō Manueimon|ja|大砲萬右ェ門}} , the 18th yokozuna († {{ill|1918|ja|1918}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘長}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1263|ja|1263}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}} ) – {{ill|Shinran|ja|親鸞}} , regarded as the founder of Jōdo Shinshū (* {{ill|1173|ja|1173}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|29|12|1|10|30|12|11|1130}}

[[sn:November 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿八]] [[zh:十一月廿八]] [[en:draft:November 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日}} ) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872年12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|ja|徳川義直}} , the first lord of the Owari Domain and ninth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1650|ja|1650}} ). * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1736|ja|1736}} {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Kanjado|ja|木村蒹葭堂}} , a literati and painter († {{ill|1802|ja|1802}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|January 16|ja|1月16日}} ) – {{ill|Inoue Kaoru|ja|井上馨}} , a statesman and genrō († {{ill|1915|ja|1915}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}} ) – {{ill|Katsura Tarō|ja|桂太郎}} , a three-time Prime Minister and general († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|January 10|ja|1月10日}} ) – {{ill|Tsukitei Kobundo|ja|月亭小文都}} , a rakugo performer († {{ill|1902|ja|1902}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日}} ) – {{ill|Taihō Manueimon|ja|大砲萬右ェ門}} , the 18th yokozuna († {{ill|1918|ja|1918}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘長}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1263|ja|1263}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}} ) – {{ill|Shinran|ja|親鸞}} , regarded as the founder of Jōdo Shinshū (* {{ill|1173|ja|1173}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|29|12|1|10|30|12|11|1130}}

[[sn:November 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿八]] [[zh:十一月廿八]] [[en:draft:November 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日}} ) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872年12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Kōji}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|ja|徳川義直}} , the first lord of the Owari Domain and ninth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1650|ja|1650}} ). * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1736|ja|1736}} {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Kanjado|ja|木村蒹葭堂}} , a literati and painter († {{ill|1802|ja|1802}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|January 16|ja|1月16日}} ) – {{ill|Inoue Kaoru|ja|井上馨}} , a statesman and genrō († {{ill|1915|ja|1915}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}} ) – {{ill|Katsura Tarō|ja|桂太郎}} , a three-time Prime Minister and general († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|January 10|ja|1月10日}} ) – {{ill|Tsukitei Kobundo|ja|月亭小文都}} , a rakugo performer († {{ill|1902|ja|1902}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日}} ) – {{ill|Taihō Manueimon|ja|大砲萬右ェ門}} , the 18th yokozuna († {{ill|1918|ja|1918}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘長}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1263|ja|1263}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}} ) – {{ill|Shinran|ja|親鸞}} , regarded as the founder of Jōdo Shinshū (* {{ill|1173|ja|1173}} ).

[[sn:November 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿八]] [[zh:十一月廿八]] [[en:draft:November 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日}} ) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872nd year 12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Kōji}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|ja|徳川義直}} , the first lord of the Owari Domain and ninth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1650|ja|1650}} ). * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1736|ja|1736}} {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Kanjado|ja|木村蒹葭堂}} , a literati and painter († {{ill|1802|ja|1802}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|January 16|ja|1月16日}} ) – {{ill|Inoue Kaoru|ja|井上馨}} , a statesman and genrō († {{ill|1915|ja|1915}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}} ) – {{ill|Katsura Tarō|ja|桂太郎}} , a three-time Prime Minister and general († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|January 10|ja|1月10日}} ) – {{ill|Tsukitei Kobundo|ja|月亭小文都}} , a rakugo performer († {{ill|1902|ja|1902}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日}} ) – {{ill|Taihō Manueimon|ja|大砲萬右ェ門}} , the 18th yokozuna († {{ill|1918|ja|1918}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘長}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1263|ja|1263}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}} ) – {{ill|Shinran|ja|親鸞}} , regarded as the founder of Jōdo Shinshū (* {{ill|1173|ja|1173}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|29|12|1|10|30|12|11|1130}}

== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日}} ) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872nd year 12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Kōji}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|ja|徳川義直}} , the first lord of the Owari Domain and ninth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1650|ja|1650}} ). * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1736|ja|1736}} {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Kanjado|ja|木村蒹葭堂}} , a literati and painter († {{ill|1802|ja|1802}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|January 16|ja|1月16日}} ) – {{ill|Inoue Kaoru|ja|井上馨}} , a statesman and genrō († {{ill|1915|ja|1915}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}} ) – {{ill|Katsura Tarō|ja|桂太郎}} , a three-time Prime Minister and general († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|January 10|ja|1月10日}} ) – {{ill|Tsukitei Kobundo|ja|月亭小文都}} , a rakugo performer († {{ill|1902|ja|1902}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日}} ) – {{ill|Taihō Manueimon|ja|大砲萬右ェ門}} , the 18th yokozuna († {{ill|1918|ja|1918}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘長}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1263|ja|1263}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}} ) – {{ill|Shinran|ja|親鸞}} , regarded as the founder of Jōdo Shinshū (* {{ill|1173|ja|1173}} ).

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿八]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685|12=draft}} {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海|12=draft}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Tenkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|12=draft}} {{ill|December 28|ja|12月28日|12=draft}} ) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1872nd year 12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Kōji|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1601|ja|1601|12=draft}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|ja|徳川義直|12=draft}} , the first lord of the Owari Domain and ninth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} († {{ill|1650|ja|1650|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1736|ja|1736|12=draft}} {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Kanjado|ja|木村蒹葭堂|12=draft}} , a literati and painter († {{ill|1802|ja|1802|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836|12=draft}} {{ill|January 16|ja|1月16日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Inoue Kaoru|ja|井上馨|12=draft}} , a statesman and genrō († {{ill|1915|ja|1915|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848|12=draft}} {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Katsura Tarō|ja|桂太郎|12=draft}} , a three-time Prime Minister and general († {{ill|1913|ja|1913|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869|12=draft}} {{ill|January 10|ja|1月10日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tsukitei Kobundo|ja|月亭小文都|12=draft}} , a rakugo performer († {{ill|1902|ja|1902|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869|12=draft}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Taihō Manueimon|ja|大砲萬右ェ門|12=draft}} , the 18th yokozuna († {{ill|1918|ja|1918|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|弘長|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1263|ja|1263|12=draft}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shinran|ja|親鸞|12=draft}} , regarded as the founder of Jōdo Shinshū (* {{ill|1173|ja|1173|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|29|12|1|10|30|12|11|1130}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿九]]
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿九]]
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿九]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:not Butsumetsus]] [[Category:Days 28 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]][[sn:November 28 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:November 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 28일]] [[ja:11月28日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月廿八]] [[en:draft:November 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:11月29日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:November 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 29일]] [[ja:11月29日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月廿九]] [[en:draft:November 29 (Lunisolar)]]

18 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:11月28日 (旧暦) up to rev 83630722
revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月28日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[貞享]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1685年]][[1月3日]]） - [[渋川春海|安井算哲]]が、平安時代から使われていた[[宣明暦]]の誤りを修正・改良した大和暦を幕府に提出。後の[[貞享暦]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月28日]]） - 長崎・横浜・函館の運上所を[[税関]]に改称 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月28日） - 国民皆兵を原則とした[[徴兵]]の詔書を発布。各地で反対一揆が起きる
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1601年]][[1月2日]]） - [[徳川義直]]、初代[[尾張藩]]主・[[徳川家康]]の九男（+ [[1650年]]） * [[元文]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1736年]][[12月29日]]） - [[木村蒹葭堂]]、[[文人]]・[[文人画|文人画家]]（+ [[1802年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月16日]]） - [[井上馨]]、政治家・[[元老]]（+ [[1915年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1848年]][[1月4日]]） - [[桂太郎]]、11・13・15代[[内閣総理大臣]]・陸軍大将（+ [[1913年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[1月10日]]） - [[月亭小文都]]、[[落語家]]（+ [[1902年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[12月30日]]） - [[大砲万右エ門|大砲萬右ェ門]]、18代[[横綱]]（+ [[1918年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘長]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1263年]]1月9日） - [[親鸞]]<ref>[{{NDLDC|821948/21}} 本願寺聖人親鸞傳繪上]</ref>、[[浄土真宗]]の宗祖とされる僧。（* [[1173年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|27|11|29|10|28|12|11|1128}}

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月28日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[貞享]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1685年]][[1月3日]]） - [[渋川春海|安井算哲]]が、平安時代から使われていた[[宣明暦]]の誤りを修正・改良した大和暦を幕府に提出。後の[[貞享暦]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月28日]]） - 長崎・横浜・函館の運上所を[[税関]]に改称 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月28日） - 国民皆兵を原則とした[[徴兵]]の詔書を発布。各地で反対一揆が起きる
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1601年]][[1月2日]]） - [[徳川義直]]、初代[[尾張藩]]主・[[徳川家康]]の九男（+ [[1650年]]） * [[元文]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1736年]][[12月29日]]） - [[木村蒹葭堂]]、[[文人]]・[[文人画|文人画家]]（+ [[1802年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月16日]]） - [[井上馨]]、政治家・[[元老]]（+ [[1915年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1848年]][[1月4日]]） - [[桂太郎]]、11・13・15代[[内閣総理大臣]]・陸軍大将（+ [[1913年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[1月10日]]） - [[月亭小文都]]、[[落語家]]（+ [[1902年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[12月30日]]） - [[大砲万右エ門|大砲萬右ェ門]]、18代[[横綱]]（+ [[1918年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘長]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1263年]]1月9日） - [[親鸞]]<ref>[{{NDLDC|821948/21}} 本願寺聖人親鸞傳繪上]</ref>、[[浄土真宗]]の宗祖とされる僧。（* [[1173年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|27|11|29|10|28|12|11|1128}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿八]][[zh:十一月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q841105]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 28|qq=November 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyō|Tenkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the [[:en:Jōkyō|Tenkyō]] calendar). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872nd year 12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:August 19|August 19]]) – [[中村不折]], a Western-style painter and calligrapher (died [[:en:1943|1943]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:696|696]] [[:en:August 13|August 13]]) – [[高市皇子]], a prince of Emperor Tenmu (born ~654?). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1824|1824]] [[:en:August 4|August 4]]) – [[Maeda Seihiro]], 12th lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[:en:1782|1782]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123|qq=}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyō|Tenkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the [[:en:Jōkyō|Tenkyō]] calendar). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872nd year 12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:August 19|August 19]]) – [[中村不折]], a Western-style painter and calligrapher (died [[:en:1943|1943]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:696|696]] [[:en:August 13|August 13]]) – [[高市皇子]], a prince of Emperor Tenmu (born ~654?). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1824|1824]] [[:en:August 4|August 4]]) – [[Maeda Seihiro]], 12th lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[:en:1782|1782]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿八]][[zh:十一月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q841105]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 28|qq=November 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyō|Tenkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the [[:en:Jōkyō|Tenkyō]] calendar). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 28|December 28]]) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872nd year 12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:August 19|August 19]]) – [[中村不折]], a Western-style painter and calligrapher (died [[:en:1943|1943]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:696|696]] [[:en:August 13|August 13]]) – [[高市皇子]], a prince of Emperor Tenmu (born ~654?). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1824|1824]] [[:en:August 4|August 4]]) – [[Maeda Seihiro]], 12th lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[:en:1782|1782]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:August 19|August 19]]) – [[中村不折]], a Western-style painter and calligrapher (died [[:en:1943|1943]]).

== Events == * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Tenkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Shunkai|en|Shibukawa Shunkai|WD=Q786877|lt=Shibukawa Harumi}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Tenkyō}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|WD=Q2832|lt=December 28}}) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1872nd year 12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|WD=Q2829|lt=August 19}}) – [[中村不折]], a Western-style painter and calligrapher (died {{ill|1943|en|1943|WD=Q18623|lt=1943}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|696|en|696|WD=Q23486|lt=696}} {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|WD=Q2776|lt=August 13}}) – [[高市皇子]], a prince of Emperor Tenmu (born ~654?). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1824|en|1824|WD=Q6994|lt=1824}} {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|WD=Q2784|lt=August 4}}) – [[Maeda Seihiro]], 12th lord of the Kaga Domain (born {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|November 28|qq=November 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Tenkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Shunkai|en|Shibukawa Shunkai|WD=Q786877|lt=Shibukawa Harumi}} revised the old Senmyō calendar into the Yamato calendar (later known as the {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Tenkyō}} calendar). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|WD=Q2832|lt=December 28}}) – The customs offices at Nagasaki, Yokohama, and Hakodate were renamed as customs. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1872nd year 12月28日) – A decree for universal conscription was issued, prompting uprisings in various regions.
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|WD=Q2829|lt=August 19}}) – [[中村不折]], a Western-style painter and calligrapher (died {{ill|1943|en|1943|WD=Q18623|lt=1943}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|696|en|696|WD=Q23486|lt=696}} {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|WD=Q2776|lt=August 13}}) – [[高市皇子]], a prince of Emperor Tenmu (born ~654?). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1824|en|1824|WD=Q6994|lt=1824}} {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|WD=Q2784|lt=August 4}}) – [[Maeda Seihiro]], 12th lord of the Kaga Domain (born {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123|qq=}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|696|en|696|WD=Q23486|lt=696|1=696}} {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|WD=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}}) – [[高市皇子]], a prince of Emperor Tenmu (born ~654?). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1824|en|1824|WD=Q6994|lt=1824|1=1824}} {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|WD=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}}) – [[Maeda Seihiro]], 12th lord of the Kaga Domain (born {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}}).
